name: data-table
title: Data Table (All Variants)
description: Generic data table with filtering, infinite scroll variant, and tree variant. Fully featured.

files.content:
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow, } from "@/components/custom/table"; import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton"; interface DataTableSkeletonProps { /** * Number of rows to render * @default 10 */ rows?: number; } export function DataTableSkeleton({ rows = 10 }: DataTableSkeletonProps) { return ( {new Array(rows).fill(0).map((_, i) => ( ))}
); }
